items.title: Senegal's sacked PM Sonko elected parliamentary Speaker in challenge to president
items.dek: As speaker, Sonko could use his position to challenge the policies of the president, his one-time ally.
items.body: As speaker, Sonko could use his position to challenge the policies of the president, his one-time ally.

items.title: Iran condemns US strikes as 'gross violation' of ceasefire
items.dek: The attacks took place while Iranian and Qatari negotiators were in Doha for peace talks.
